scripts.typecheck: biome lint ./packages && tsc --noEmit -p packages/tanstack-use-core/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/tanstack-use-permissions/tsconfig.json   && tsc --noEmit -p packages/tanstack-use-ui/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/tanstack-use-todo/tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck:all: tsc --noEmit -p packages/tanstack-use-core/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/tanstack-use-permissions/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/tanstack-use-files/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/tanstack-use-ai/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/tanstack-use-ui/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/tanstack-use-todo/tsconfig.json
